question: Will the U.S. Senate pass the recently proposed legislation to curb prediction markets before June 1, 2026?
reason: No evidence of Senate passage of the BETS OFF Act before June 1, 2026.
evidence: The BETS OFF Act was introduced in March 2026, but as of May 27, 2026, there is no record of it passing the Senate.
Congress.gov, the official source for congressional legislation, does not list the BETS OFF Act as having passed the Senate.
